# Manuscript Status {.unnumbered}

This book is developed in the open and in order, so not every chapter carries the
same weight. The table below records, per chapter, how mature the material is and
what level of verification it has passed. The tiers themselves are defined in the
project's verification policy; here they are only reported.

Two distinctions matter when reading it. *Maturity* describes how settled the
writing and structure are, from an early **seed** through a **working draft** and
a **stabilizing** chapter to **mature** material. *Verification* describes whether
a chapter has passed a distinct review pass — editorial (**V1**), conceptual
(**V2**), or technical (**V3**) — and a dash means no formal pass is yet recorded.
Contribution and verification are separate: that a chapter exists says nothing
about whether it has been checked. Read chapters that are early in maturity or
unverified as provisional.

{{< include _manuscript-status-table.md >}}

The data above is generated from a single canonical ledger
(`metadata/manuscript-status.yml`) in the project repository, which also holds the
per-chapter contribution notes. Authorship and contribution policy is described in
the Preface; the verification tiers are defined in the project's verification
policy.
